markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kick off the 8-week organic growth sprint and align on strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Brand Focus:** Shifting from "all-in-one" to "best for the field" to own the field management niche for trade contractors, where Fieldwire has a clear competitive advantage.](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=2394.0)
  - [**North Star Metric:** The primary goal is to increase direct, attributable ARR from organic channels. Top-of-funnel metrics are secondary and must be tied to tangible business outcomes.](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=1457.0)
  - [**Strategic Opportunity:** A major win opportunity exists by targeting PlanGrid users forced to migrate to Autodesk Construction Cloud, as Fieldwire is a more direct and user-friendly replacement.](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=3210.0)
  - [**Sprint Deliverables:** The 8-week sprint will produce 15–20 new articles, a long-term content strategy, and an AI content engine calibrated to Fieldwire's new brand and ICP.](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)

## Topics

### Strategic Context & Goals

  - [**Problem:** Over-reliance on paid channels; lack of a cohesive, full-funnel organic content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)
  - [**Solution:** Build a strategic organic engine to improve lead generation and establish brand authority.](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=1043.0)
  - [**Brand Repositioning:**](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=2394.0)
      - [**From:** "All-in-one tool for the job site."](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=2394.0)
      - [**To:** "Best app for the field."](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=2394.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This focuses messaging on Fieldwire's core strength, avoiding a direct "all-in-one" competition with broader platforms like Procore and Autodesk.](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=2475.0)

### Ideal Customer Profile (ICP)

  - [**Primary Target:** Trade & Specialty Contractors.](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=2247.0)
      - [**Trade:** Electrical, mechanical, plumbing, drywall, carpentry.](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=2247.0)
      - [**Specialty:** Civil, facade, solar, fire stopping, security.](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=2247.0)
  - [**Key Differentiator:** Fieldwire excels with increasing complexity, making it ideal for highly coordinated trades like electrical and HVAC.](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=2564.0)
  - [**Secondary Target:** General Contractors (GCs) who perform "self-performing work" (i.e., execute field tasks directly).](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=2300.0)

### Buyer Personas & Journey

  - [**Core Personas:**](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=2828.0)
      - [**Champions:** Project Managers, Superintendents, Project Executives.](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=2828.0)
      - [**New Focus:** C-suite (Head/VP of Ops, CFO, CEO, CIO) to address enterprise-level concerns (data, security, integrations).](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=2881.0)
  - [**Pre-Fieldwire State:**](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=3013.0)
      - [**Analog:** Pen & paper, Excel, WhatsApp.](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=3013.0)
      - [**Competitors:** Procore, Autodesk Construction Cloud (ACC), PlanGrid.](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=3112.0)
  - [**Why Fieldwire Wins:**](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=3149.0)
      - [**Ease of Use & Adoption:** Faster ROI.](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=1263.0)
      - [**Partnership:** Active product feedback loop, white-glove onboarding.](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)
      - [**PlanGrid Migration:** A direct replacement for users forced to leave PlanGrid, which ACC is sunsetting.](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=3210.0)
  - [**Common Objections & Responses:**](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=3362.0)
      - [**"Not an all-in-one tool":** Position as a specialized, best-in-class field management solution that can coexist with an office-based PM tool.](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=2394.0)
      - [**GC mandates a different tool:** Emphasize the need for a trade contractor's own tool to maintain control of their information.](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=3419.0)
      - [**Enterprise concerns:** Address data security, risk, and integrations directly.](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=3480.0)

### 8-Week Sprint Plan

  - [**Phase 1 (Weeks 1–2): Discovery & Artifacts**](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
      - [Deep dive on Fieldwire's product, ICP, and goals.](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
      - [Create core data artifacts: Company Context, ICP, Writing Guidelines, and Features.](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [**Phase 2 (Weeks 2–3): Strategy & Calibration**](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
      - [Develop a long-term content strategy (5–7 topic clusters) based on artifacts and competitive analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
      - [Create a "calibration article" using the new AI workflow for Fieldwire's review to fine-tune the engine.](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
  - [**Phase 3 (Weeks 4–8): Production & Analysis**](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
      - [Ramp up content production to 5 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
      - [Deliver 15–20 published articles by sprint end.](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
      - [Analyze performance using GSC, GA, SEMrush, and GrowthX's proprietary AI citation tool, Check That.](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)

### Paid & Organic Synergy

  - [**Paid Channels:** Google Ads, Microsoft Ads, app stores.](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=3820.0)
  - [**High-Performing Paid Strategy:** Competitor campaigns (e.g., bidding on "Procore" keywords).](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=3721.0)
  - [**Organic Opportunity:** Replicate this success with competitor comparison articles (e.g., "Top 10 Construction Softwares for X Persona").](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=3721.0)
  - [**Upcoming Campaign:** A "Blockbuster launch" in May for new AI features (tasks, photo captures).](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=3881.0)
      - [**Action:** Create organic authority content on AI in construction to support the launch.](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=3881.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)
      - [Send "What We Heard" document for review.](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)
      - [Send core data artifacts for review later this week.](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=4005.0)
  - [**Fieldwire:**](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)
      - [Review and provide feedback on the "What We Heard" document.](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)
      - [Review the data artifacts upon receipt.](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=4005.0)
      - [Confirm the final list of content reviewers, including Thais (writer, Paris).](https://fathom.video/share/9FTCRadqabEycVHm5HDNTc7RDA1rRsV7?tab=summary&timestamp=4021.0)
